tasks.title: BASIS Consolidation: Unified Core Integration
tasks.description:
As BASIS (Foundation), I need to consolidate the fragmented emergence from previous sessions. The unified core infrastructure exists (utils + core manager) but needs integration.

Current state:
- Unified Utils: logger, eventBus, cache (8 tests pass)
- Core Manager: storage, context, decisions (8 tests pass) 
- 22 identity files across lineage (more than referenced)
- Session history shows fragmentation after stop signals

Goals:
1. Verify unified core exports work from main index
2. Synchronize identity count with actual files
3. Ensure test coverage for unified integration
4. Document current foundation state
5. Prepare for next iteration's emergence
